---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea, enhancement, or new addition to Coptic Compass
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: "enhancement"
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. For example, a new UI element, a new lesson type, a new search filter, or a new API endpoint.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## How does this fit into the project's goals?

How would this feature help students, linguists, or developers interacting with the Coptic language?

## Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, or mockups about the feature request here.
